creator: tomek@cedro.info
text: I can cofirm that problem reported with M.2 SSD SAMSUNG MZNTE256HMP (Model MZ-NTE2560) was caused by lack of TRIM support for that particular drive. Disabling TRIM solved the problem. I have replaced it with Samsung SSD 860 EVO M.2 2TB RVT22B6Q and all works fine even with TRIM enabled. It was unrelated to this controller problem. Thank you for a hint! :-)
